title: 10,000 BBY
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Year |image=[[File:Ryloth.jpg]]
[[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in 10,000 BBY |galacticera=[[Ductavis Era]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |conflict= |chancellor= |chief= |head= |emperor= |events= *Establishment of the [[Kumauri Empire]] {{Circa}}''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' *Beginning of the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] recorded history {{Circa}}[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']], p. x *A list of the [[Twenty Wonders of the Galaxy]] was compiled by [[Vicendi]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] {{Circa}}''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *Discovery of [[madilon]] {{Circa}}''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]'' |eras=[[Old Republic era]]{{Blog|holocron|24|Star Wars Eras}} }} The year '''10,000 before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] (BBY)''', also known as '''26,463 after the [[Tho Yor Arrival]] (TYA)''', '''6,347 before the [[Treaty of Coruscant]] (BTC)''', '''9,000 before the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation''']] and '''9,965 before the [[Great ReSynchronization]]''', was a span of time during the [[Ductavis Era]]. ==Events== *The [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Vall Kumauri]] established his [[Kumauri Empire|empire]] in the outlying regions of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. {{Circa}} *The [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Species/Legends|species]] began their recorded history. {{Circa}} *The [[Historian/Legends|historian]] [[Vicendi]] compiled a list of the [[Twenty Wonders of the Galaxy]], which was featured in his work ''[[Arturum Galactinum]]'', commissioned for the anniversary of the Republic. *The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] was discovered by [[Scout/Legends|explorers]]''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' and joined the Republic. {{Circa}} *The alloy [[madilon]] was discovered. {{Circa}} *The planet [[Ord Gimmel/Legends|Ord Gimmel]] is discovered by Republic explorers. {{Circa}}''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]'' *[[Vima-Da-Boda's lightsaber]] was created.[[Dark Empire endnotes|''Dark Empire'' endnotes]] ==Sources== *[[Dark Empire endnotes|''Dark Empire'' endnotes]] *''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' {{Imo}} *[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] *''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' *''[[Suns of Fortune]]'' {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ---- {{Years-Ductavis}} {{Interlang
